title: Count Submatrices with Top-Left Element and Sum Less Than k
titleCn: 元素和小于等于 k 的子矩阵的数目

testcases.input: grid = [[7,6,3],[6,6,1]], k = 18 Output: 4 Explanation: There are only 4 submatrices, shown in the image above, that contain the top-left element of grid, and have a sum less than or equal to 18.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are only 4 submatrices, shown in the image above, that contain the top-left element of grid, and have a sum less than or equal to 18.

testcases.input: grid = [[7,2,9],[1,5,0],[2,6,6]], k = 20 Output: 6 Explanation: There are only 6 submatrices, shown in the image above, that contain the top-left element of grid, and have a sum less than or equal to 20.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: There are only 6 submatrices, shown in the image above, that contain the top-left element of grid, and have a sum less than or equal to 20.
